message:
Expand test coverage: fcp-raptorq (+86), fcp-e2e (+45)

fcp-raptorq: chunk.rs +18, config.rs +29, error.rs +21, encode.rs +10,
oti.rs +8. Covers RawChunk edge cases, PathProfile serde/Copy, repair
ratio boundaries, MTU safe symbol sizing, exact Display output for all
error variants, encode/decode roundtrip across payload sizes 1-1024.

fcp-e2e: lib.rs +27 (scan_log_jsonl edge cases, E2eReport/E2eBatchReport
serde+clone, E2eError Display, InvokeExpectations, ConnectorSuite/
ComplianceSuite constructors). logging.rs +18 (AssertionsSummary traits,
E2eLogEntry validation, E2eLogger drain, LogSchemaError Display).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
